tools.name: ingestion.run_mock
tools.description: Run mock ingestion and refresh frequency, insights, and media-profile signals for a user.

tools.name: vocab.insights.get
tools.description: Fetch topic clusters and objective links from ingestion.

tools.name: graph.dashboard.get
tools.description: Fetch the learner dashboard model with roadmap, skill tree, overlays, and graph-driven recommendations.

args.learnerId: string (optional, personaId alias accepted by mock runtime)

tools.name: graph.next_actions.get
tools.description: Fetch deterministic next-step lesson, hangout, review, mission, and overlay recommendations.

args.learnerId: string (optional, personaId alias accepted by mock runtime)

tools.name: graph.lesson_bundle.get
tools.description: Fetch the next lesson bundle from the learner graph.

args.learnerId: string (optional, personaId alias accepted by mock runtime)

tools.name: graph.hangout_bundle.get
tools.description: Fetch the next hangout validation bundle from the learner graph.

args.learnerId: string (optional, personaId alias accepted by mock runtime)

tools.name: graph.evidence.record
tools.description: Record learner evidence events and return updated progression metrics.

args.learnerId: string (optional, personaId alias accepted by mock runtime)

tools.name: graph.pack.validate
tools.description: Validate a curriculum pack for cycles, orphans, duplicate nodes, and metadata coverage.

tools.name: graph.overlay.propose
tools.description: Propose personalized YouTube/Spotify overlay branches from learner goals and media preferences.

args.learnerId: string (optional, personaId alias accepted by mock runtime)
